name: VOD HTTP Filesystem
description: Expose VOD library to Plex as mountable HTTP filesystem with category support and multi-provider streaming
author: onehottake

fields.label: HTTP Port
fields.help_text: Port for the HTTP filesystem server

fields.label: Dispatcharr Base URL
fields.help_text: Base URL of Dispatcharr instance (must be reachable from rclone/Plex)

fields.label: Enable Authentication (Token-based)
fields.help_text: When enabled, require a valid Dispatcharr API key via Authorization: ApiKey <key> or X-API-Key: <key> header. Default OFF for easy browser troubleshooting and initial setup.

confirm.message: Are you sure you want to stop the HTTP filesystem server?

actions.label: Show rclone Configuration
actions.description: Display the rclone configuration for mounting this filesystem
